summary: 6 film announcements, 7 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Austin Powers 4
film.announcement: Mike Myers confirms that a fourth Austin Powers film is in development and will happen.

film.title: FlySquad – First Strike!
film.announcement: Cher and Bob Geldof are in talks to voice roles in the animated feature FlySquad – First Strike!

film.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight 2
film.announcement: Geena Davis expresses interest in making a sequel to The Long Kiss Goodnight with Samuel L. Jackson, calling it her favorite film.

film.title: Zeta
film.announcement: Zeta sequel is among local titles confirmed for Prime Video Spain's 2027 slate.

film.title: Dímelo 3
film.announcement: Mercedes Ron's Dímelo 3 is confirmed for Prime Video Spain's 2027 slate.

film.title: Steps
film.talent: Nikki Glaser, Ali Wong, Amanda Seyfried
film.announcement: Nikki Glaser joins Netflix's animated fairy tale Steps alongside Ali Wong and Amanda Seyfried.

tv.title: Exit Right
tv.talent: Susan Sarandon, Kim Coates, Roberta Colindrez, Amy Sedaris, Ethan Slater, Christopher Jackson
tv.announcement: Drama Exit Right wraps production with a cast including Susan Sarandon, Kim Coates, Roberta Colindrez, Amy Sedaris, Ethan Slater, and Christopher Jackson.

tv.title: Bridge & Tunnel
tv.announcement: Comedian Des Bishop's special Bridge & Tunnel is set for release on Hulu.

tv.title: Survival of the Thickest
tv.announcement: Season 3 trailer unveiled for Survival of the Thickest, announced as the third and final season.

tv.title: The Westies
tv.announcement: Crime drama The Westies drops trailer with J.K. Simmons leading the cast; co-creator Chris Brancato teases season 1 details.

tv.title: One Night in Idaho: The College Murders
tv.announcement: One Night in Idaho: The College Murders is renewed for Season 2 at Amazon with new testimony.

tv.title: Prison Break
tv.announcement: Lukas Gage teases a dark and gritty Prison Break reboot in development at Hulu.

tv.title: The Paris-Tokyo Job
tv.announcement: Studiocanal sets true crime art heist docuseries The Paris-Tokyo Job with Sunny Side of the Doc launch.
